$comment: Maps a Playwright screenshot name (from toHaveScreenshot('NAME.png')) to its doc image destinations under assets/img/. `npm run sync-docs` copies the standalone-light baseline to `light` and standalone-dark to `dark`. `dark` is OPTIONAL — omit it for shots the docs only embed in light mode (most do, via {{< reuse-image >}} / {{< reuse-image-light >}}); the dark baselines are still captured + diffed for visual regression, just not published. Confirm paths against the guides before committing regenerated images.

ui-playground-multi-tools.png.$note: mcp/connect/virtual — multiplexed playground showing tools from both targets (time_* and everything_*).

ui-tool-time-current.png.$note: mcp/connect/virtual — result of running the time target's get_current_time tool.

agentgateway-ui-tool-echo-hello.png.$note: Shared by mcp/connect/virtual and observability/traces+metrics — echo tool result.

agentgateway-ui-tools-openapi.png.$note: mcp/connect/openapi — playground listing the OpenAPI-derived tools.

agentgateway-ui-tools-openapi-success.pn.$note: mcp/connect/openapi — a successful OpenAPI tool call (HTTP 200).

agentgateway-ui-tools-jwt.png.$note: observability/traces+metrics — playground with a JWT supplied before the tool call.

ui-a2a-listener.png.$note: agent/a2a — the new UI has no A2A playground, so this and ui-a2a-route replace the old ui-a2a-skills/ui-a2a-success shots, captured from the Traffic route/listener view.

ui-llm-playground.png.$note: new-UI LLM playground; captured against a mock OpenAI provider.

agentgateway-ui-kube-landing.png.$note: observability/ui (kubernetes) — read-only Gateway Overview in xds mode. Captured via tests/kube-readonly.spec.ts against a port-forwarded proxy (UI_BASE_URL).

agentgateway-ui-kube-cel.png.$note: observability/ui (kubernetes) — CEL Playground (the one Tools view available in xds mode).

agentgateway-ui-kube-route-mcp.png.$note: mcp quickstart + mcp/static-mcp verify step — read-only route detail drawer for the mcp route. Captured via tests/kube-readonly.spec.ts; requires the mcp route in the cluster.

agentgateway-ui-kube-route-llm.png.$note: llm quickstart + llm/providers/openai verify step — read-only route detail drawer for the openai route.

agentgateway-ui-kube-route-http.png.$note: non-agentic-http quickstart + install/sample-app verify step — read-only route detail drawer for the httpbin route.

ui-cost-dashboard-cost.png.$note: llm/cost-controls/dashboard — Analytics dashboard measured in dollars (realized spend).

ui-cost-dashboard-tokens.png.$note: llm/cost-controls/dashboard — Analytics dashboard: token traffic over time with group-by and measure controls.

agentgateway-ui-kube-cost-dashboard.png.$note: kubernetes/llm/cost-controls/dashboard — Analytics cost dashboard rendered in the Kubernetes (xds) Admin UI (Traffic nav).

ui-virtual-keys-list.png.$note: llm/cost-controls/virtual-keys — Admin UI Virtual API Keys list.

ui-virtual-keys-new.png.$note: llm/cost-controls/virtual-keys — Create virtual key drawer (name, auto-generated key, metadata).

ui-cost-catalog.png.$note: llm/cost-controls/costs — LLM Costs catalog management page (sources + custom overrides).
